display_text: Lance of Pursuit, Cost: 0: Tier neutral item providing +200 Mana. Its Hound passive deals 20 bonus damage and slows enemies by 16% (8% if Ranged) for 2 seconds when attacking from behind (within 90-degree angle). This creates significant chasing potential and duel advantage for melee heroes who can position behind their target. Stats: Mana: +200, Slow Duration: 2s, Backstab Damage: 20, Angle: 90°.
